description: Chat Saving Architecture Phase C archive capability gate. Grants the minimum filesystem access for the app-owned saved-chat archive / content-addressed store (CAS) under $APPLOCALDATA/archive. Scoped strictly to that app-owned archive root: mkdir + exists + binary read-file + binary write-file for CAS/package materialization, plus read-dir only for C5 archive/package diagnostics under archive/packages. Intentionally grants NO remove/rename (CAS blobs are content-addressed and immutable; no GC in Phase C) and NO broad $HOME / $APPLOCALDATA access. This is the security boundary only; no UI, no sync, no import/recovery, and no package-export save dialog are added here. The live archive/CAS root is deliberately separate from the Sync lane's $HOME/H2O Studio Sync/ folder (ADR-0009, ADR-0010).
